mnemonics: Cats Love Tacos (C-L-T) for Chalk and Talk method
PowerPoint Presentation: P-P for Pointers and Pictures
keyPoints: Introduction (Chalk and Talk method): Chalk and Talk method is an effective teaching method
Preparation (PowerPoint Presentation): Use PowerPoint to create engaging presentations
Delivery (Chalk and Talk method): Deliver the lecture with enthusiasm and confidence
Post-Preparation (PowerPoint Presentation): Practice PowerPoint before presenting
Delivery Skills (Chalk and Talk method): Speak clearly, make eye contact, and pace well
Engagement (PowerPoint Presentation): Add visuals, animations, and interactive elements
Feedback (Chalk and Talk method): Encourage questions and discussions
Evaluation (PowerPoint Presentation): Assess student understanding and adjust presentation
